title: (Epstein, Kim, Schanke) Trial K+ Minimal Media Recipe
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dp9n9","text":"Original Epstein recipe calls for","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9582a","text":"Na2HPO4, 46 mM - MW (141.96)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":2,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":6,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f0nst","text":"NaH2PO4, 23 mM - MW (119.98)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":3,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":6,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"20fpi","text":"(NH4)2SO4, 8 mM - MW (132.14) –want 4mM in our recipe so does not interfere with probe","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":3,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":5,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":8,"length":1},{"style":"bold","offset":31,"length":55}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"argf4","text":"MgSO4, 0.4 mM - MW (120.37)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":4,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5945h","text":"FeSO4, 6uM- MW (151.91)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":4,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f88i0","text":"sodium citrate, 1 mM -  MW (258.068)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b01ki","text":"thiamine hydrochloride, I mg/liter;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dninp","text":"Glycerol, 0.4% (0.4% glucose for control)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3j808","text":"50 mg/L of each of the ?18? natural L-amino acids.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Rinse the beaker with DI H2O Fill to ~900mL MiliQ water Set to mix, no heat. Choose between: In media room/dry goods Above lab benches In the fridge Fill to 1L with MiliQ and mix till dissolved (can be on low heat) Check pH (should be ~7), [K + ] (normally ~8 ppm), and filter

Rinse the beaker with DI H2O Fill to ~200mL MiliQ Set to mix, no heat Choose between: In media room/dry goods Above lab benches In the fridge Fill to 250mL with MiliQ and mix till dissolved (can be on low heat) Check pH (should be ~7), [K + ] (normally ~8 ppm), and filter
In media room/dry goods 6.5302g/L of Na2HPO4 3.16 g/L of NaH2PO4 0.52855 g/L of (NH4)2SO4 500mg of amino acid mix 3

Above lab benches MgSO4, 400uL of 1M stock - 0.4 mM 5mL of 10mg/mL amino acid mix 1 - 50 mg/L 5mL of 10mg/mL amino acid mix 2 - 50 mg/L Glycerol, 5mL of 80% stock - 0.4% sodium citrate, 1mL of stock of 1M - 1 mM
In fridge 0.1mL of 10mg/mL Thiamine - I mg/L FeSO4, 600uLof stock of 10 mM - 6uM
In media room/dry goods 1.633g of Na2HPO4 0.79g of NaH2PO4 0.132g of (NH4)2SO4 125mg of amino acid mix 3

Above lab benches MgSO4, 100uL of 1M stock - 0.4 mM 1.25mL of 10mg/mL amino acid mix 1 - 50 mg/L 1.25mL of 10mg/mL amino acid mix 2 - 50 mg/L Glycerol, 1.25mL of 80% stock - 0.4% (glucose control, 5mL 20% stock) sodium citrate, 250uL of stock of 1M - 1 mM
In fridge 25uL of 10mg/mL Thiamine - I mg/L FeSO4, 150uL of stock of 10 mM - 6uM
